title: [YTP] The Bad Prince of Breaking Fresh Wind (100K subscriber special)
description:
Not quite at 100,000 yet, but close enough!  An absolute trainwreck or monumental extravaganza of a testicle bag's worth of sources inside a video longer in minutes than you can sustain your viagra-induced erection.  You nasty, tasty subscribers.  I owe it all to you.

This also partially serves as tribute to the late James Avery.  Sources in this video you'll find incude Fresh Prince, Breaking Bad, Winnebago Man, and The Lonely Island among others.

This would have been even longer than 15 minutes, but since I've been a bad boy on this account, I can't upload longer.

(I 100% believe the use of these source materials constitutes "Fair Use".  I'm certainly not making any profit from this, trust me...)
